programme.title: Dance Moms
programme.desc: (PG) Abby’s Annual Dance Concert is always bigger than any old recital and this year is no different, as the theme is an emotional tribute to her mother.

programme.title: Dance Moms
programme.desc: Young dancers train and compete under a demanding coach while striving for success in elite competitions. Their mothers clash over favoritism, pressure, and their children’s roles within the team. Intense rehearsals, rivalries, and emotional conflicts drive drama on and off the stage.

programme.title: Dance Moms: Episode
programme.desc: Young dancers train and compete under a demanding coach while striving for success in elite competitions. Their mothers clash over favoritism, pressure, and their children’s roles within the team. Intense rehearsals, rivalries, and emotional conflicts drive drama on and off the stage.

programme.title: Dance Moms
programme.desc: (PG) Nationals are a day away, and with all of the distractions of Hollywood, the moms worry Abby has not given enough attention to the routines.

programme.title: Dance Moms
programme.desc: Young dancers train and compete under a demanding coach while striving for success in elite competitions. Their mothers clash over favoritism, pressure, and their children’s roles within the team. Intense rehearsals, rivalries, and emotional conflicts drive drama on and off the stage.

programme.desc: Young dancers train and compete under a demanding coach while striving for success in elite competitions.
